case_title: BAY CITY REPORTING VS. JAMES J O'DONNELL

docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $2,024.35 FILED BY BAY CITY REPORTING AS TO DEFENDANT O'DONNELL, JAMES J ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR AUG-29-2016 AT 06:30 PM IN DEPT 506
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FEE FOR SERVICE: $50.00 SERVED JUL-26-2016, SUBSTITUTE SERVICE ON NATURAL PERSON AS TO DEFENDANT O'DONNELL, JAMES J

SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF AUG-29-2016 - CONTINUED FOR PROGRESS REPORT TO DEC-19-2016 AT 6:30 PM IN DEPT. 506. APPEARANCES BY PLAINTIFF'S REPRESENTATIVE COLLEEN REDAMONTI, OWNER OF BAY CITY REPORTING, AND DEFENDANT JAMES J. O'DONNELL. THE PARTIES REACHED A SETTLEMENT, THE TERMS OF WHICH ARE AS FOLLOWS: (1) JAMES J. O'DONNELL (ON BEHALF OF O'DONNELL & SMITH) SHALL PAY BAY CITY REPORTING $2,024.35, WITH AN INITIAL PAYMENT OF $524.35 ON OR BEFORE 9/15/16, $500.00 ON OR BEFORE 10/15/16, $500.00 ON OR BEFORE 11/15/16 AND $500.00 ON OR BEFORE 12/15/16; (2) JAMES J. O'DONNELL SHALL PREPARE A STIPULATED JUDGMENT REFLECTING THE TERMS OF THIS ARRANGEMENT WHICH CAN BE FILED BY BAY CITY REPORTING IF O'DONNELL & SMITH DEFAULTS ON ANY OF THE PAYMENTS ARRANGEMENTS; AND (3) THE PARTIES RECOGNIZE THAT THIS SETTLEMENT IS ENFORCEABLE IN ANY CALIFORNIA COURT OF LAW IN THE CITY & COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO. BOTH MS. REDAMONTI & MR. O'DONNELL SIGNED THE SETTLEMENT AGREEMENT. IF NEITHER PARTY APPEARS AT THE NEXT CALLING OF THE CASE, THE COURT SHALL DISMISS THIS MATTER WITH PREJUDICE. PROOF OF SERVICE ON FILE. EXHIBITS NOT RETAINED. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL. CLERK: K. DOUGHERTY. NOT REPORTED. (D506).
THE COURT ORDERS DISMISSAL OF THE ENTIRE ACTION WITH PREJUDICE. CASE SETTLED. NO APPEARANCES. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. PRO TEM JUDGE: DAVID LAVINE. CLERK: J. BERTELSEN. NOT REPORTED. (506)
DECLARATION OF APPEARANCE ON BEHALF OF CORPORATION PURSUANT TO CCP 116.540 (B)-(H) FILED BY PLAINTIFF BAY CITY REPORTING
